title: QoL Client
description: Lighting fast performance and Quality of Life, all in a convenient and completely client-side package.
body:
![QoL Client Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/486937f33aadec4cc2ad7839a6d9dbecd9c2433c_0.webp)

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/55de73718dfe478e87965cd348557330d70c6e04_0.webp)
---

The QoL Client is a fabric modpack which contains the fastest performance boosting mods and features a ton quality of life features.

![Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/854c63318fa8debc3a998d53a21028107de78261_0.webp)
---

## Enhanced Clouds and Weather
![Clouds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de557a651be1bf51836aeb44730ede460fe57bd2_0.webp)

## A revamped options menu
![Options](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c21190993781b45e3449797176a57bcb63d0ece_0.webp)

## An in-game Resource Pack, Datapack and Shader Pack browser
![Resource Packs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/384d5fe28a5de0a6b0a3379e5d984f1684622dcf_0.webp)

## And much more!
- Play with your friends without a server using e4cm.
- Mods like REI and Jade can be optionally turned on by the player through configs or keybinds.
- Lighting fast performance!
- Many other QoL mods and visual improvements.
- Extra translations for mods bundled in.

![Supported Versions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec356d8a1deba0c6118bd80ba3ded573896e80b0_0.webp)
---

As of now, 1.21.10 is the main supported version, with 1.21.11 having almost every mod as well.

1.0 and 2.0 are deprecated as neoforge + sinytra just isn't that performant and doesn't make sense for a pack like this. Use them at your own risk.

In 2026 Q1, Minecraft 26.1 will come out, and with that QoL Client 4.0, aiming to always support the latest versions, on both fabric and neoforge, along with a new pack aimed at content creators.

![Full Mod Breakdown](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f54e80e76a17dd4ac9f6491eacbf11e3eda0715c_0.webp)
---
<details>
<summary>Show</summary>

Full breakdown of the 58 mods and 2 resource packs inside of QoL Client.
# Performance (13)

For chunk rendering:
- C2ME
- Noisium

Client Side:
- Sodium
- Sodium Extra
- Sodium Shadowy Path Blocks
- Sodium Core Shaders

- BadOptimizations
- EntityCulling
- ImmediatelyFast
- Language Reload

Server & General:
- Lithium
- FerriteCore
- Very Many Players

# Optifine Features Parity (4)

- Iris Shaders
- BetterGrassify
- LambDynamicLights
- Ok Zoomer

# Optifine Resource Packs Parity (8)

- Continuity
- Entity Model Features
- Entity Sound Features
- Entity Texture Features
- OptiGUI
- Polytone*
- Puzzle
- Skyboxify

# Quality Of Life (18)

Essential QoL:
- Appleskin
- Cubes Without Borders
- Mouse Tweaks
- No Chat reports

Chat Tweaks:
- Chat Heads
- Chat Animation
- Chat Patches*

Optional added info:
- JEI // REI*
- Jade

- Durability Plus*
- Shulker Box Tooltip
- Better Advancements*

Nice to haves:
- Controlify
- Simple Voice Chat
- Resourcify
- e4mc

Fixes:
- MacOS Input Fix
- Universal Shortcuts*

# Aesthetics / Ambience (6)

- Better Clouds
- Particle Rain

- Not Enough Animations
- Visuality

- Blur Plus
- Raised

# Modpack Utilities (3)

- FancyMenu
- Mod Menu
- YOSBR

# Libraries (6)

- Architectury API*
- Fabric API
- Fabric Language Kotlin
- Cloth Config

- Konkrete
- Melody

// Bundled in other mods so they don't need to be installed standalone.
- YetAnotherConfigLib

*\*Missing 26.1.2 version*

# Resource Packs (2)

- Translations for Sodium
- Parity Title

</details>

Reporting bugs or making suggestions on the discord server is greatly appreciated!
